value.found_quote: Ultraplan hands a planning task from your local CLI to a [Claude Code on the web](/en/claude-code-on-the-web) session running in [plan mode](/en/permission-modes#analyze-before-you-edit-with-plan-mode). Claude drafts the plan in the cloud while you keep working in your terminal.
value.rationale: The page describes ultraplan as handing a planning task from the local CLI to a Claude Code on the web session running in the cloud, matching the claim. It also references ultrareview as the code review counterpart ("Find bugs with ultrareview: the code review counterpart to ultraplan for catching issues before merge"). The page states ultraplan is in research preview.
